rulings.Case Title: DE ANZA FLP VS. STERLING BANK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order 1) To Compel Responses To Requests For Production, Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogaotrires; 2) To Deem Pltf And X-Deft To Respond To Requests For Admission (Set One) As Admissions Pursuant To Ccp 2033.280
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 6, 2012 Line 1 - CROSS COMPLAINANT STERLING SAVINGS BANK, A WASHINGTON STATE's Motion For Order 1) To Compel Responses To Requests For Production, Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogaotrires; 2) To Deem Pltf And X-Deft To Respond To Requests For Admission (Set One) As Admissions Pursuant To Ccp 2033.280. Off calendar per moving party. =(EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: FREDY MARTINEZ VS. CITIBANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR THE HOLDERS OF et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 6, 2012 Line 6 - DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR THE HOLDERS OF, BANK OF AMERICA N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the 1st cause of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action 2nd (to allege injury in fact, i.e. loss of property or money paid), 3rd (to allege facts showing SOL tolling; requisite particularity; and reliance) and 4th (to allege facts showing SOL tolling and actionable conduct after contract inception). =(EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER RODRIGUES VS. PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION, et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 6, 2012 Line 7 - DEFENDANT PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Is continued to 7/20/12. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6C by 7/13/12 4pm. =(EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: SIOE CHEUNG et al VS. SONIA MARTINEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 6, 2012 Line 4 - DEFENDANT SONIA MARTINEZ's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overruled, 5 days to answer. Defendant's attorney is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. =(EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIOAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. GIOCONDA OBANDO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 6, 2012 Line 2 - DEFENDANT MARIO REYES, STEPHANIE REYES, CHRISTOPHER REYES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 1st cause of action; overruled as to the 2nd causes of action. =(EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIOAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. GIOCONDA OBANDO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 6, 2012 Line 2 - DEFENDANTs GIOCONDA OBANDO and KYLEY HARVEY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 1st cause of action; Overruled as to the 2nd cause of action. =(EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: DONNA LEE PARKER VS. TWILA ADELE PARKER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 6, 2012 Line 3 - DEFENDANT TWILA PARKER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar. First Amended Complaint filed on 6/11/2012 and Demurrer to First Amended Complaint filed 6/19/2012. =(EC/501)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. ROBERTO LEZAMA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 6, 2012 Line 5 - DEFENDANT ROBERTO LEZAMA's Motion To Quash. Granted, subject to opposition. =(EC/501)
